anomalies: Pin coordinates are mechanically derived from the crystal-ap-tracker pack's own johtokanto map locations (288×120 px, +2px center offset) — not hand-placed; Ho-Oh and the beasts are nudged ≤3px off Tin/Burned Tower so overlapping pins stay tappable
Map image reused from the tracker pack (src-ap-tracker, MIT-style licensed repo) — swap for ripped game art later if preferred

notes: Fills deck slot 4 (mapPins, global): the 15 one-shot/static moments of the run, spatially. Item-by-item field loot stays with the spine and the 'Flourishing Findings' roundup.
